small.name: Typical Community Church
small.notes: 200-300 seat sanctuary; fellowship hall; small office suite; education wing

medium.name: Christ the Light Cathedral
medium.notes: SOM design; 1,350 seats; mausoleum; conference center; parish offices

large.name: Lakewood Church (Compaq Center renovation)
large.notes: Megachurch; 16,800 seats; broadcast studio; bookstore; cafe; extensive children's wing

space_library.name: Sanctuary / Worship Hall
notes: 18-22 SF/seat pews; 10-12 SF/seat chairs; reverberation time 1.5-3.0 sec for liturgical; clear height 25-60 ft; consider balcony for larger congregations

space_library.name: Narthex / Foyer / Gathering Space
notes: Pre-function gathering; 3-5 SF per sanctuary seat; welcome desk; book/resource table

space_library.name: Chancel / Bimah / Minbar Platform
notes: Raised platform; liturgical furniture; baptismal font/pool; Torah ark; altar orientation (Qibla for mosque)

space_library.name: Sacristy / Robing Room / Imam Office
notes: Vestment storage; communion prep; piscina (liturgical sink); private entry to chancel

space_library.name: Choir Room / Music Suite
notes: 20-25 SF/person; riser storage; instrument storage; sound isolation; direct access to sanctuary

space_library.name: AV / Sound / Broadcast Booth
notes: Clear sightline to chancel; livestream capability; located rear of sanctuary or balcony

space_library.name: Fellowship Hall / Social Hall
notes: 15 SF/seat banquet; divisible partitions; used for overflow, meals, events; stage optional

space_library.name: Commercial / Catering Kitchen
notes: Health department review; Type I hood; 3-compartment sink; walk-in cooler for large; pass-through to fellowship hall

space_library.name: Classrooms / Sunday School
notes: 25-35 SF/person; age-separated; nursery requires separate toilet, sink, crib area; youth rooms larger

space_library.name: Nursery / Childcare
notes: 35 SF/child; diaper changing; toddler toilet; parent pager system; secure check-in/out; visual from corridor

space_library.name: Wudu / Ablution Area (Mosque)
notes: Low foot-washing stations; separate men/women; non-slip flooring; floor drains; between entry and prayer hall

space_library.name: Pastoral / Administrative Offices
notes: Pastor office 150-250 SF; counseling privacy; reception area; workroom

space_library.name: Conference / Meeting Room
notes: Board meetings; counseling; small group study

space_library.name: Restrooms
notes: IBC Assembly fixture counts; family restroom; distribute near sanctuary and fellowship hall

space_library.name: Service Entry / Delivery
notes: Kitchen deliveries; furniture/equipment access; screened from public view

space_library.name: General Storage
notes: Chair/table storage for fellowship; seasonal decorations; classroom supplies

space_library.name: Mechanical Room
notes: Sanctuary HVAC must be whisper-quiet; consider variable volume for occupancy swings

space_library.name: Electrical Room
notes: Theatrical dimming systems for sanctuary; broadcast power for larger churches

plan_archetypes.notes: Hall-and-wing with sanctuary as central volume
